intro:
Ride your hopper and conquer a brutal climb!
One mistake sends you all the way back to the start.
A tense, heart-pounding hopping action game!
description:
A sudden nightmare strikes!
The mischievous mad scientist Anemone has turned Octo and friends into stone…!?
To save them, weapon-obsessed scientist Toad sets off on a dangerous climb using his custom-built hopping machine—the Soul Hopper.

This spin-off mini-game from Goonya Monster stars series favorite Toad.
…Putting yourself through all that for your friends isn’t so bad, right?

◇ Simple controls!
Charge your jump by pressing the button the moment you land.
Adjust your angle while charging, then release to launch yourself into a powerful leap!

◆ Two difficulty modes!
Choose between Easy and Hard modes.
Pick the challenge that suits your playstyle… or push yourself to the limit!

◆ Bounce, crash, and fall…
Every mistake can send you crashing back down—but each attempt gets you a little further.
Stay patient, learn the angles, and keep climbing.
Persistence is the only way to reach the top.

◆ A climb full of hazards
Crumbling platforms, burning footholds, and more stand in your way.
What you need is courage—and perfect timing.
Take the leap for your friends!

◇ Battle mode (Offline 2-player mode)
In Battle mode, the mastermind behind it all—Anemone—joins the fray from Goonya Monster!
Use your Soul Hopper to collect more coins than your opponent before time runs out.
Smash into your rival to steal their coins—sometimes, aggression is the best strategy!
